summary:
Amantadine is officially recognized by the FDA as an approved medication for both antiviral use and managing Parkinson’s symptoms. The extended-release formulation (amantadine ER) falls within this existing regulatory framework and is considered part of its overall approval status.  

Note: This summary does not include any information about off-label or unapproved indications beyond what was provided in the original response.
